loop1.title: PQ Issues KPI Strip (Total Issues / I-THD Events / V-THD Events / PF Gap Feeders / Neutral Stress / Worst I-THD / Worst V-THD)
loop1.note: Showing aggregate panel PQ issue counts and worst-case metrics; per-phase voltage harmonics (h3/h5/h7) and k-factor are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Harmonics & PQ Timeline
loop1.note: Showing per-feeder THD and power data from panel members; sag/swell/neutral event counts are not directly measured on this panel aggregate and are omitted.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing active power (kW) for panel members — per-phase THD and voltage harmonics are not measured for this aggregate panel (data is sourced from sibling cards).

loop1.title: Feeder PQ At {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-feeder THD and power data for 6 active feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and honest-blank.

loop1.title: Signature
loop1.note: Showing current THD (I-THD) and voltage THD (V-THD) per feeder; 3rd harmonic (H3) and K-factor are not measured by this meter's schema.
